query:
UPDATE sessions s
            SET message_count = sub.cnt,
                first_message_time = sub.first_ts,
                last_message_time = sub.last_ts
            FROM (
                SELECT count(*) AS cnt,
                       min("timestamp") AS first_ts,
                       max("timestamp") AS last_ts
                FROM messages WHERE session_id = $1
            ) sub
            WHERE s.id = $1
            RETURNING s.project_id
